# Ferbz

> Ferbz is billing software for local businesses. It sends bills on WhatsApp and runs automatic follow-up reminders so customers come back, without the owner having to remember to chase anyone.

Ferbz combines fast, tax-ready billing with WhatsApp-based customer retention: every sale is billed in seconds, delivered as a WhatsApp PDF, and followed up automatically on a schedule the business sets once. It is built for independent local businesses (pharmacies, kirana/grocery stores, electronics shops, clothing stores, salons/spas) rather than enterprise retailers.

## Product

- [Homepage](https://ferbz.com/): overview of the product, the retention problem it solves, and a walkthrough of a typical day using Ferbz.
- [Features](https://ferbz.com/features): all tools in one view.
- [Follow-up Reminders](https://ferbz.com/features/follow-up-reminders): automatic WhatsApp reminders sent on the right day from the business's own number.
- [Customer Records](https://ferbz.com/features/patient-records): centralized customer, item, and follow-up-interval data with CSV import.
- [Daily Queue](https://ferbz.com/features/daily-queue): a sorted daily list of who is due, overdue, or recently returned.
- [Broadcast Campaigns](https://ferbz.com/features/broadcast-campaigns): segmented WhatsApp broadcasts to many customers at once.
- [Retention Analytics](https://ferbz.com/features/retention-analytics): reporting on which customers are being kept versus lost.
- [Automation](https://ferbz.com/#automation): multi-step WhatsApp journeys (trigger, message, follow-up, exit) beyond a single fixed reminder.
- [Pricing](https://ferbz.com/#rates): Starter and Pro plan pricing and feature comparison.
- [Bulk Billing Solution](https://ferbz.com/ferbz-customisable-bulk-billing-solution): customisable bulk billing for higher-volume businesses.

- [About](https://ferbz.com/about): company background and mission.
